_comment: Sovereign-side mirror of ../chromoFold/packaging/chromofold_capability.json `reference_fixtures` + its `header_seam` contract (a 4-byte ASCII magic + a u32 little-endian version prefixing every reference blob). Committed source-of-truth (SDD-300 pattern; the engine repo is not host-resident). The conformance seam validates the REAL fixtures against this manifest when CHROMOFOLD_ROOT / WARP_SHADERS_ROOT is resident (mirroring packaging/seam_check.c on the sovereign side, no GPU), and honest-degrades to manifest-only validation otherwise.
